no_internet: You're offline. Showing cached data. Some features may be limited.
no_llm: AI assistant is not available. I can still help with basic commands.
fallback_response:
I didn't understand that. You can try:
• "Post Load" — to create a new load
• "Find Load" — to search for loads
• "My Trips" — to check your trips
• "Navigate" — to start navigation
fallback_response_voice: Sorry, I didn't understand. Try saying post load, find load, or check status.
queued_action: Your action has been queued. It will be sent when you're back online.
cached_data_notice: Showing saved data. Pull down to refresh when online.
sync_failed: Some items couldn't sync. Tap to retry.
